records.name: Barrier Spell
records.description: Prevents HP of caster and party members within 40m from falling below 10% for 3s. Cannot block certain powerful attacks. Tenaciousness, Salvation, and Barrier Spell effects cannot be applied for 30s if Invincibility stacking is blocked.
records.descriptionFr: Empêche les PV du lanceur et des membres du groupe à moins de 40 m de descendre sous 10 % pendant 3 s. Ne bloque pas certaines attaques puissantes.Les effets Tenaciousness, Salvation, et Barrier Spell ne peuvent pas être appliqués pendant 30 s si le cumul d’invincibilité est bloqué.

records.name: Undefeated Mantra
records.description: Increases PvE Damage Boost and PvE Damage Tolerance by 10.5% and PvP Damage Boost and PvP Damage Tolerance by 5.25% for the caster and nearby party members. Does not stack with the Damage Boost effect from the Cleric skill [Light of Protection] and only the highest skill level effect applies. If both skills are the same level, Undefeated Mantra will be applied.

If both skills are the same level, Undefeated Mantra will be applied.

records.descriptionFr: Sélectionne une cible à moins de 20 m et inflige des dégâts jusqu’à 4 ennemis dans un rayon de 4 m autour de la cible avec 30% de chances d’infliger étourdissement pendant 3 s. 100 % de chances d’appliquer étourdissement sur cibles PNJ. Increases défense de max 20% proportional à hit cibles.

records.name: Blessing of Life
records.description: Increases the caster's HP by 150 . Increases Max HP by an additional 6.5% and Heal Boost by 5% .

records.name: Protection Circle
records.description: Grants a Protection Circle that lasts for 5s on landing an attack. Removes the Protection Circle at 10 stacks and grants Divine Barrier to the caster and party members, which blocks 262 damage and increases Incoming Heal by 10% for 10s. The Divine Barrier refreshes upon reaching 10 stacks of Protection Circle while Divine Barrier is active. Protection Circle Cooldown: 0.5s
records.descriptionFr: Confère à Protection Circle that lasts pendant 5 s lorsqu’une attaque touche. Removes the Protection Circle at 10 charges et confère Divine Barrier à le lanceur et membres du groupe, which blocks 262 damage et augmente soins reçus de 10% pendant 10 s. The Divine Barrier refreshes upon reaching 10 charges de Protection Circle pendant que Divine Barrier is active. Protection Circle temps de recharge: 0.5s

records.name: Earth's Promise
records.description: Reduces the target's PvE Damage Tolerance by 10.5% and PvP Damage Tolerance by 5.25% for 5s each time an attack lands when the caster's HP is 75% or more. Cooldown: 10s

records.name: Survival Willpower
records.description: Increases the caster's Status Effect Resist by 16.5% . Increases PvE Damage Tolerance by 12% and PvP Damage Tolerance by 6% for 5s when afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear. Increases Status Effect Resist by 10% for 5s when hit while afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear (Max 10 stacks). Damage Tolerance Increase Cooldown: 60s Status Effect Resist Increase Cooldown: 1s
records.descriptionFr: Augmente le lanceur's Status Effect résistance de 16.5%. Augmente résistance aux dégâts PvE de 12% et résistance aux dégâts PvP de 6% pendant 5 s lorsque affectée par étourdissement, renversement, projection en l’air, gel, or Fear.
